description: All sub-dimensions healthy (no tier 2/3 trigger), but a high-confidence matched failure pattern alone should push the proportional elevation factor over 0.05 and flip NORMAL to CAUTIOUS on both sides. This specifically exercises each language's own MatchResult.confidence read: TS's MatchResult has a plain `confidence` field; Python's MatchResult only has raw_confidence/normalised_confidence plus a `confidence` @property alias — confirms the alias is actually wired into resolve_control_state()'s getattr(matched_pattern, 'confidence', 0.0) read, not silently falling back to the 0.0 default.
